# Chapter 7: Additive manufacturing  (~110 pp)
- 7.1 What additive is and is not (10) · 7.2 Polymer printing: FDM, SLA, MJF (15) · 7.3 Metal printing: SLM, EBM, DED (18) · 7.4 Process-property relationship (15) · 7.5 Design for additive: lattices, internal structures (18) · 7.6 Hybrid manufacturing (10) · 7.7 Industrial qualification of additive parts (15) · 7.8 Failure section: anisotropy, porosity, residual stress, warping (9)

**Archetype**: scaling, optimisation, failure. **Project**: design and print a topology-optimised bracket; load-test it. **Exercises**: 25.
